title: pelargonium somalense
intro: Pelargonium somalense, also known as Somali Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium somalense include relief from digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium somalense can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
